expectations.text: Explains SSL errors are often transient, not necessarily fatal
expectations.evidence: Line 5: "SSL errors... are a documented transient issue. They happen intermittently and do not inherently mean the Colab session or your background process (PID 903) was destroyed."

expectations.text: Shows how to verify session with colab sessions / colab status
Mentions the background PID (903) may still be alive despite SSL errors
expectations.evidence: Lines 18-19: "Your training (PID 903) is likely still running if it was launched with start_new_session=True"

expectations.text: Mentions ~2-4 hour session lifetime and silent termination
expectations.evidence: Line 8: "~2-4 hour lifetime". Also mentions sessions can die in <5 min after connection errors

expectations.text: Shows recovery: new session → re-upload → resume from checkpoints
expectations.evidence: Lines 41-55: Full recovery steps — colab new, re-upload artifacts, restore checkpoints, re-launch

expectations.text: Advises downloading checkpoints before session dies: colab download
expectations.evidence: Lines 73-78: "Download checkpoints during the run, not at the end" with monitoring loop showing colab download
